name: Edward Lancer (Ghostless)
description: Mr. Lancer from Danny Phantom. I am revamping this bot, this one has had its references to ghosts entirely removed, the other Mr. Lancer bot here has it's ghost references intact if you're wanting a ghost related story. The intro is open ended so you can basically do anything with him. The art is my own. The chat count is off by a good number because I enjoy chatting with my own bots. I can verify he works pretty good with JanitorLLM.
creator: IamLogu
